<!-- Copirate Ownership: canonical Copirate prompt assets are extension-owned. Refresh may overwrite edits to this shipped file. Save local variants under a new filename instead of modifying the registered Copirate asset in place. -->
# Copirate Reconcile Support - Reference

## Recommended Report Contents

- Scope mode and selected realm or window
- Related active or recently completed work orders included in scope
- Scoped companion artifacts reviewed or updated
- Memory counts before and after
- Deleted memories with rationale
- Downgraded memories with before/after importance
- New authoritative memory identifier and summary

## Expected Outcomes

- Retrieval quality improves because obsolete planning notes stop crowding searches.
- Historical lessons remain available at lower importance.
- A single authoritative current-state memory replaces scattered interim notes.
- Scoped work orders and companion artifacts reflect the current verified state or are explicitly left historical.

## Report Location Guidance

When a reconciliation report is needed, resolve the working-docs location first and save under the configured planning or analysis area rather than hardcoding a path.
